title: EasyMute
description: Fabric mod that adds a keybind for muting and unmuting the game.
body:
# EasyMute
EasyMute is a Fabric mod that adds a modifiable keybind for muting and unmuting the game. Latest versions will always work for the latest version of Minecraft and Fabric.

## How To Use
Press the default button M to mute, press again to unmute. You can change the keybind in control settings.
